author: codex

patch.value: Ship a secure, maintainable, fully tracked jellyfin-cli

Establish repository-local pm governance and bring jellyfin-cli to a clean, secure, current, and verified state across runtime behavior, dependencies, CI workflows, documentation, and release readiness.

Repository-local .agents/pm is initialized and committed with durable .toon items and .jsonl history.; All actionable security, dependency, code, CI, and documentation findings are fixed or explicitly documented with rationale.; The final pushed head passes the complete release verification surface.
Protect users and maintainers while keeping the agent-oriented Jellyfin CLI dependable and releasable.
Eliminates known dependency exposure, fixes user-visible output defects, and creates durable project lineage.
Zero actionable dependency alerts, green release validation, resolved product defects, and complete repository-local pm history.
GitHub reports critical/high dependency alerts and issue #23 documents broken session output behavior.

message: Initialize jellyfin-cli modernization goal from live GitHub and repository inventory
